content_rights.rationale: The exact Spanish-horizontal source group says the intact video may be freely shared and downloaded; NASA/SVS attribution, no-endorsement, and third-party-music limits remain controlling.

transcript_rights.rationale: NASA/SVS publishes the same-group es-LA VTT as an official caption asset. Private preservation is provisional under the cited terms; third-party and legal/policy review remain unresolved and controlling.

content_completeness.rationale: The official source page labels the associated transcript complete; the 11.038-second uncovered tail remains recorded as source coverage rather than inferred speech.

retention_and_derivation.rationale: Private preservation evaluation only; no soundtrack extraction, model upload, general training, or full-text publication.

third_party_caveats: Universal Production Music soundtrack is not extracted, remixed, or redistributed.

version_equivalence.evidence: The Spanish-horizontal SVS media group co-locates ESP_Horizontal.mp4, the es-LA sidecars, transcript artifact, and exact NASA en español YouTube link.
